questions.q: Which country defeated South Korea on March 11, 2026, to become the first-ever Paralympic gold medallists in wheelchair mixed doubles curling?
Which major Canadian bank announced the acquisition of the fintech startup 'Pinch Financial' today to streamline digital mortgage qualifications?
Natural Resources Minister Tim Hodgson announced today that Canada will participate in a massive release of how many barrels of oil to stabilize global energy prices?
In a significant political move today, Nunavut MP Lori Idlout officially crossed the floor to join which federal party's caucus?
Canada's national baseball team made history today by advancing to the quarter-finals of the World Baseball Classic for the first time ever after defeating which country 7-2?
